description:
Recto: list of books, a "bundle" containing paper quires (כראריס כאגצה) of works by Saʿadya and Shemuʾel Gaʾon.

Verso: accounts of some sort in Arabic script, unclear if private or official. Mentions Abū l-Faraj al-Qasam(?). (Information in part from CUDL)
description_he: מכתב בArabic, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
